title: Blossom Bliss Wrap
description: A floral and comforting Dutch dish featuring Italian seasoning wrapped in a plant-based-friendly wrap for a delightful breakfast or light meal.

ingredients.name: Grilled Cheese Sandwiches
ingredients.notes: Use whole-grain bread for extra fiber

ingredients.name: Italian Seasoning Mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or health food stores

ingredients.name: Soft Lettuce Leaves
ingredients.notes: Use the outer layers for their best texture and color

ingredients.name: Plant-Based Spread
ingredients.notes: Nutella or similar spread can be used as a base

instructions: Place the grilled cheese sandwiches on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle Italian seasoning over each sandwich and gently press it into the bread with a spatula to ensure even coverage.
Top each grilled cheese with softened lettuce leaves, starting from the edge and working your way towards the center to create an attractive leafy border.
Spread plant-based spread on top of the wrapped lettuce for added texture and flavor. Be generous, as this will distribute throughout the wrap.
Place another layer of lettuce over the spread for more visual interest and a slight crunch.
Fold the top halves of each sandwich over to form a neat square shape, pressing lightly with a spatula where needed to secure the leaves in place.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the outside but still soft inside.
Serve warm and enjoy your Blossom Bliss Wrap as a comforting breakfast or light meal.
